---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem would this feature solve? Which workflow is awkward today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the desired feature as concretely as possible. UI sketches welcome. -->

## Alternatives

<!-- Which alternatives did you consider? Why are they less suitable? -->

## Affected modules

<!-- e.g. Live Connections, DNS, Firewall, Telemetry, Startup, History, Settings -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to specifications, similar tools, screenshots, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and did not find a duplicate.
- [ ] The feature fits the project's goals (Windows network transparency / monitoring).
- [ ] The feature does not bring in dependencies with problematic licenses (LGPL+ without opt-in, GPL, proprietary) for the standard build.
